p5.post: the merger proposal earlier, the company would have avoided substantial financial losses.
p5.zh: 如果董事會早些批准合併提案，公司本可避免重大財務損失。
p5.why: 此句為第三條件句倒裝，省略 if，將助動詞 had 移至句首（Had the board...）。從句動詞須用過去分詞 approved（= if the board had approved），主句用 would have + p.p.。選項 B would approve 屬第二條件句型態，選項 C has approved 為現在完成式，選項 D approves 為現在式，均與倒裝假設語氣結構不符。

p5.post: in strict accordance with international accounting standards, the financial statements were subsequently certified by an independent auditor.
p5.zh: 依照國際會計準則嚴格編製後，財務報表隨後由獨立審計師認證。
p5.why: 主要子句主詞 financial statements 與 prepare 之間為被動關係（報表「被編製」），分詞構句須以過去分詞 Prepared 開頭。Preparing 為主動現在分詞，邏輯主語不符。Having been preparing 強調持續性主動動作，語意冗贅且邏輯錯誤。To prepare 為不定詞，不能作分詞構句的起首成分。

p5.pre: The chairman submitted his resignation letter on Friday,
p5.post: came as a shock to most board members.
p5.zh: 董事長於週五提交辭呈，此事讓大多數董事會成員深感震驚。
p5.why: 空格所在子句指稱前面整個句子的內容（提交辭呈此事），關係代名詞須用 which。非限定關係子句不可用 that（that 只引導限定子句）。what 引導名詞子句，不引導關係子句。who 只代替「人」，不代替事件。

p5.pre: The contract shall remain in full force and effect,
p5.post: any breach of the ancillary provisions contained herein.
p5.zh: 本合約應持續完全有效，縱使其中附屬條款遭到任何違反。
p5.why: notwithstanding 作介系詞，表「縱使、不拘於」，後直接接名詞片語，是法律文書中的慣用讓步表達。nevertheless 為副詞，不能後接名詞片語。provided that 引導條件子句，後需完整從句。whereas 引導對比子句，亦需完整從句，故三者均不適用。

p5.post: the quarterly results than the stock price began its precipitous decline.
p5.zh: 公司一宣布季度業績，股價便開始急劇下跌。
p5.why: No sooner... than 為否定副詞片語，置於句首時須主謂倒裝。No sooner 後接過去完成式倒裝（had + 主詞 + p.p.），than 後接過去簡單式。選項 B 語序未倒裝。選項 C did...announce 為一般過去式倒裝，適用於 Hardly/Scarcely...when 結構。選項 D 無倒裝且時態不符。

p6.title: Revision of Remote Work Policy and Compliance Requirements
seg:
TO: All Staff
FROM: Human Resources Department
RE: Revision of Remote Work Policy and Compliance Requirements

This memorandum is issued to notify all personnel of the forthcoming revisions to the company's remote work policy, effective August 1, 2026. The revised framework
in close consultation with department heads over the past three months to address operational deficiencies identified during the annual performance review.
Under the revised guidelines, employees seeking to maintain remote work arrangements must submit a formal application to their immediate supervisor no later than July 15, 2026.
, applications received after this date will be subject to a review period of no fewer than ten business days, potentially delaying approval until September.
The revised policy also stipulates that all remote employees must complete a mandatory cybersecurity training module
commencing any off-site work. Failure to comply with this requirement will result in the immediate suspension of remote work privileges.
The Human Resources Department will host an informational session on June 30, 2026, to address any questions or concerns regarding the new policy.
We encourage all employees to attend and to review the complete policy document, which has been uploaded to the company intranet.

blanks.zh: 修訂後的框架在過去三個月內與部門主管密切磋商後制定，以解決年度績效審查中發現的業務缺陷。
blanks.why: 過去三個月的磋商工作延續至現在，須用現在完成被動式 has been developed，強調動作已完成且結果與現在相關。was being developed 為過去進行被動式，暗示工作尚未結束。developed 為主動簡單式，framework 無法自行 develop。had developed 為過去完成主動式，時態與語態均不符。

blanks.zh: 否則，在此日期之後收到的申請將須經歷不少於十個工作日的審查期，可能導致批准延遲至九月。
blanks.why: 前句說明截止日期（7月15日），空格引出不遵從該規定的後果。Otherwise 表「否則」，邏輯銜接最為緊密。Furthermore 表「此外」，用於並列添加資訊，非條件後果。Consequently 表「因此」，需有明確因果前提，此處前句為條件句，非成因。Nevertheless 引出轉折，語意相反。

blanks.zh: 修訂後的政策亦規定，所有遠距工作員工必須在開始任何離站工作之前完成強制性資安培訓模組。
blanks.why: prior to 作介系詞，表「在……之前」，後接動名詞 commencing，是正式文件說明先決條件的標準用法。pursuant to 表「依據」，後接規定或文件名稱，不接動作。in lieu of 表「代替」，語意不符。with respect to 表「關於」，亦不符「之前」的時序語意。

opts: Attendance at this session will be recorded and factored into annual performance evaluations.
Details regarding the venue and registration procedure will be circulated via email by the end of this week.
The session will be conducted entirely in Mandarin to accommodate the majority of our workforce.
Employees who fail to attend will be required to schedule individual consultations with HR.
blanks.zh: 有關場地與報名程序的詳細資訊將於本週末前透過電子郵件發送。
blanks.why: 空格位於「宣布說明會」與「鼓勵出席」之間，需插入銜接兩者的句子。選項 B 提供場地與報名細節，讓員工知道如何出席，語篇流暢自然。選項 A 談績效評核，偏離主題且語氣強制。選項 C 聲稱以中文進行，與英文備忘錄語境矛盾。選項 D 在鼓勵出席前突出懲罰措施，破壞語篇一致性。
